allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('lines:', len\(d['lines']\), '| components:', len\(d['components']\), '| suppliers:', len\(d['suppliers']\)\); print\('comp[0]:', d['components'][0]\); print\('supp[0]:', d['suppliers'][0]\)")

Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('lines:',j.lines.length,'| components:',j.components.length,'| suppliers:',j.suppliers.length\); console.log\('comp[0]:',JSON.stringify\(j.components[0]\)\); console.log\('supp[0]:',JSON.stringify\(j.suppliers[0]\)\);}\);")
